parents.subject: LU-6210 utils: Use C99 struct initializer for long_opt_start

commit.subject: LU-8502 test: Baseline test failure rates
commit.message:
LU-8502 test: Baseline test failure rates

Failures for replay-vbr test 1b, LU-8502, and for
replay-dual test 26, LU-7372, are suspected to be the
same issue. We need a baseline to see how often these
tests fail in order to test if a proposed patch fixes
these issues.

This patch is not intended to land.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=replay-vbr,replay-vbr,replay-vbr,replay-vbr,replay-vbr,replay-vbr,relay-vbr,replay-vbr
Test-Parameters: testgroup=full ostfilesystemtype=zfs mdtfilesystemtype=zfs

Signed-off-by: James Nunez <james.a.nunez@intel.com>
Change-Id: I72b12da8651126b724eb5bf38ab0015ef585bbce
